#  Request to Reset a Commitment Synced with an Integrated ERP System 
###### Which integrated ERP system are you using?
[{{integrations_Spectrum}}:](https://support.procore.com/tc/procore/Legacy/ERP%5FArchives/Legacy%5FVista%5FTutorials/request-to-reset-a-commitment-synced-with-the-viewpoint-vista-integration-by-ryvit)
_Note:_ For all other ERP Integrations, you no longer need to request to reset a commitment synced with the integrated ERP system. Instead, you can unlink them. For details, see [Unlink Commitments Synced with an Integrated ERP System](https://support.procore.com/tc/procore/Legacy/ERP%5FArchives/Legacy%5FGeneral%5FERP%5FTutorials/unlink-commitments-synced-with-an-integrated-erp-system).
## See Also

  * [How do payments made in Procore Pay sync with an integrated ERP system?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-payments-made-in-procore-pay-sync-with-an-integrated-erp-system)
title: Request to Reset a Commitment Synced with an Integrated ERP System
description: How to submit a request to delete a commitment in a project's Commitments tool after its been synced with one of the supported ERP Integrations.
